name: @metorial/baserow
description: Create, read, update, and delete rows, tables, fields, and databases in a no-code relational database platform. Manage workspaces, views (grid, gallery, form, kanban, calendar, timeline), and file uploads. Filter, sort, and search rows with AND/OR logic and view-based scoping. Configure webhooks to receive real-time notifications on row, field, and view changes. Supports a wide range of field types including text, number, date, select, link-to-table, lookup, rollup, formula, and file fields. Build no-code applications and automate workflows with triggers and actions across databases.
